endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Sql/servers/{serverName}/connectionPolicies/{connectionPolicyName}
endpoints.description: Gets the server's secure connection policy.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{SERVERNAME}} with a real servername. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{CONNECTIONPOLICYNAME}} with a real connectionpolicyname.

endpoints.name: PUT /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Sql/servers/{serverName}/connectionPolicies/{connectionPolicyName}
endpoints.description: Creates or updates the server's connection policy.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{SERVERNAME}} with a real servername. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{CONNECTIONPOLICYNAME}} with a real connectionpolicyname.
